name: Buffer Under-read
description: The product reads from a buffer using indexes or pointers that reference memory locations before the start of the targeted buffer, potentially leaking data from adjacent lower memory addresses.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[read_index] is negative or references before the buffer start, causing a read before STORAGE[buffer]'s beginning without a CONTROL[lower_bounds_check] validating the index is >= 0 before the read operation
